title: Vintage Style Glass Bottles 1 Litre Swing Top Bottles - Ideal for Domestic or Commercial Use - Fill with Water, Wine, Liquor, Oil, Beer, Schnapps or Cordials (PINK)
features: you're looking for an attractive glass water bottle for your dining table? To serve traditional lemonade to the kids? Perhaps some elegant flip top bottles for your homemade mulled wine? You want versatility? Look no further!
Glass bottle with stopper can be used to store everything from juices, gin sloe ve smoothie, vinegar, limoncello, beverages and water to oils, kombucha, beer, milk, wine, cider
Each bottle holds a volume capacity of 1000ml / 1 Litre and is NOT suitable for use with fizzy drinks.

about a new hobby? Love a pint of speciality ale at the local pub, but want one in the comfort of your own home? With our attractive swing top bottles in a traditional design, you can get brewing right away.

Ceramic Swing Top - Our plastic caps are paired with durable stainless steel closures & pressurised silicone gaskets, which maintain an airtight barrier. The leakproof lid of these brewing bottles keeps them safely sealed & preserves the taste
